case_title: COPELAND DAVID CECIL VS ROWLAND PETER LOUIS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,300.00 FILED BY COPELAND DAVID CECIL AS TO DEFENDANT ROWLAND PETER LOUIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-12-1993 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 00
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO PETER ROWLAND RETURNED SIGNED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-12-1993, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-04-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COPELAND DAVID CECIL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROWLAND PETER LOUIS $2,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,320.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOT. OF JUDGM. TO PETER ROWLAND RETURNED, MAIL RECEIVING SERVICE TERMINATED.
NOT. OF CONT. TO PETER ROWLAND RETURNED, MAIL RECEIVING SERVICE TERMINATED.
